title: Clickify
description: Clickify combines a dual-button auto clicker with a smart bridge assistant for effortless AFK automation and building.
body:
[![Minecraft 1.20.0-1.20.6](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.0--1.20.6-3C8527?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://www.minecraft.net/)
[![Fabric Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-Loader%201.20-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=fabric)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![License: All Rights Reserved](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-All%20Rights%20Reserved-critical?style=for-the-badge)](#license--usage)

> Dual-button auto clicker + bridge assistant for Fabric 1.20.0–1.20.6.

### Core Features
- **Auto Clicker:** Separate LMB/RMB profiles with three modes (`OFF`, `HOLD`, `SPAM`) and a speed slider (0–10). Optional cooldown tracking keeps redstone farms from desyncing. Global toggle key `I`.
- **Bridge Assistant:** Hold/toggle key `Y` to auto place blocks, move, sneak, sprint, and (when needed) auto jump. Helper screen (`U`) exposes every switch.
- **Camera Helpers:** Pitch lock (45°–85°) and yaw snapping (45°/90°) for perfectly straight or diagonal runs.


### Built-in Bridge Modes

| Mode | Movement | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| Nub Bridging | Straight backpedal | Always sneaks + adaptive edge safety, yaw snaps to 90°. |
| Cha Cha Bridging | Backpedal sprint + jump | Auto jumps every 4 ticks, sprinting, sneak pulses for rhythm. |
| Pro Nub Bridging | Diagonal back-left | Sneaks while strafing left, yaw snaps to 45° for diagonals. |
| Free Mode | Backpedal manual speed | Sneaks with adaptive safety; sprint/jump left to the player. |


### Key Toggles & Controls
- **Clicker screen (`O`):** Active toggle, Respect Cooldown, speed slider, LMB/RMB mode selectors.
- **Helper screen (`U`):** Bridge enabled, bridge mode cycle, Lock Pitch, Snap Yaw, Auto Place, Auto Refill, Hold vs Toggle activation, Pitch slider.
- **Hotkeys:** `I` (Quick toggle), `Y` (Bridge helper hold/toggle), `O`/`U` (open GUIs). All bindings live under `Options → Controls → Clickify`.

---


### Compatibility & Support

- Single Fabric jar supports Minecraft 1.20.0 through 1.20.6.
- Code sticks to 1.20 mappings to keep API calls stable.
- Runtime guards warn if Minecraft falls outside the supported range.
